koppa-http.description: Extended HTTP client — multipart, cookies, sessions, redirects
koppa-http.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-recon.description: Full recon suite — subdomain enum, WHOIS, zone transfer
koppa-recon.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-wordlist.description: Bundled wordlists — SecLists subset for brute-force and fuzzing
koppa-wordlist.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-report.description: Generate HTML/JSON/Markdown pentest reports from scan results
koppa-report.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-fuzz.description: Web fuzzer — directory brute-force, parameter discovery, vhost scanning
koppa-fuzz.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-sqli.description: SQL injection detection — error-based, blind, time-based payloads
koppa-sqli.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-xss.description: XSS scanner — reflected, stored, DOM-based detection with 500+ payloads
koppa-xss.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-ssl.description: TLS/SSL analyzer — cipher suites, cert expiry, HSTS, protocol versions
koppa-ssl.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-smb.description: SMB enumeration — shares, users, sessions, OS fingerprint
koppa-smb.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-ssh.description: SSH toolkit — banner grab, auth methods, key audit, brute-force helper
koppa-ssh.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-osint.description: OSINT toolkit — email harvest, social lookup, GitHub dork, Pastebin search
koppa-osint.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-encode.description: Encoding utils — base64, hex, URL, HTML, JWT decode, ROT13, XOR
koppa-encode.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-hash.description: Hash tools — identify hash type, crack via wordlist, rainbow table lookup
koppa-hash.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-nmap.description: Nmap wrapper — run scans from KOPPA scripts, parse XML output
koppa-nmap.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-api.description: REST API security tester — auth bypass, IDOR, rate limit, mass assignment
koppa-api.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-cloud.description: Cloud asset discovery — S3 buckets, Azure blobs, GCP storage enumeration
koppa-cloud.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-ldap.description: LDAP/Active Directory enumeration — users, groups, GPO, kerberoastable accounts
koppa-ldap.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-git.description: Git secret scanner — exposed .git, leaked keys, commit history search
koppa-git.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-proxy.description: HTTP proxy integration — route requests through Burp, ZAP, or SOCKS5
koppa-proxy.author: KOPPA Team

koppa-json.description: JSON/YAML processor — parse, query (jq-style), diff, format scan output
koppa-json.author: KOPPA Team
